hero.title: Master Croatian
hero.subtitle: Your premium, structured path to Croatian fluency. Master the language through real-life scenarios, cultural context, pop music, and conversational simulation.

features.title: A Smarter Way to Learn Croatian

ai.title: Simulated Conversations
ai.description: Practice dialogues with an interactive speaking assistant that adapts to your level and guides you to natural fluency.

structured.title: Structured Curriculum
structured.description: Comprehensive lessons covering grammar, vocabulary, and active listening from A1 (Beginner) to C2 (Mastery).

games.title: Active Play
games.description: Reinforce your learning with interactive mini-games like Word Match, Scramble, and Speed Quiz.

media.title: Pop-Culture Immersion
media.description: Learn from authentic materials including popular music, local media, and cultural context.

tracking.title: Gamified Progress
tracking.description: Stay motivated with daily streaks, XP points, and structured level progression tracking.

multilingual.title: Tailored for You
multilingual.description: Fully translated explanations in English, Russian, and Ukrainian to match your native language.

signIn.title: Welcome Back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to continue your Croatian journey

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noActivity: No recent activity. Start a lesson to begin!

placementTest.title: Placement Test
placementTest.subtitle: Let's determine your Croatian language level
placementTest.description: This test consists of multiple-choice questions covering grammar and vocabulary from A1 to C2 levels. Answer as many as you can!
placementTest.question: Question

results.title: Test Complete!
results.description: Based on your answers, we've determined your Croatian proficiency level.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.subtitle: Structured Croatian language learning
lessons.dictationInstructions: Listen to the audio and type what you hear in Croatian.

wordMatch.title: Word Match
wordMatch.description: Match Croatian words with their translations. Test your vocabulary knowledge!
wordMatch.instructions: Click on a Croatian word, then click its translation to make a match.

fillBlanks.title: Fill in the Blanks
fillBlanks.description: Complete Croatian sentences by choosing the correct word for each blank.
fillBlanks.instructions: Select the correct word to complete each sentence.

scramble.title: Word Scramble
scramble.description: Unscramble the letters to form the correct Croatian word. Be fast!

hangman.title: Hangman
hangman.description: Guess the Croatian word letter by letter before the hearts run out!

speedQuiz.title: Speed Quiz
speedQuiz.description: Quickly select the correct translation of the Croatian word before the timer expires!

reading.title: Reading Challenge
reading.description: Read adapted excerpts from Croatian literature, study the vocabulary, and answer comprehension questions.
reading.subtitle: Boost comprehension with literature excerpts
reading.question: Question
reading.translate: Translate this phrase into your language:

listening.title: Listening Challenge
listening.description: Listen to authentic Croatian audio resources and complete comprehension checks.
listening.subtitle: Improve audio comprehension with native speakers
listening.question: Question
listening.toBlanks: Proceed to Fill in the Blanks

aiChat.title: AI Croatian Mentor
aiChat.subtitle: Practice Croatian with your AI language tutor
aiChat.placeholder: Type a message in Croatian or ask a question...

topics.greet: How to greet someone in Croatian
topics.order: Order food at a pekara in Zagreb

meta.title: Croatia Mentor - Immersive Croatian Language & Culture Academy
meta.description: Master Croatian naturally through cultural immersion, pop music, interactive speaking dialogues, and structured lessons from A1 to C2. Step into Croatian culture today.
